version_description: Based on the studio version of the song.
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Jason Aldean
Got What I Got

Capo 4th Fret

[Intro]
| [ch]G[/ch] | [ch]A[/ch] | [ch]Bm[/ch] |


[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]                             [ch]Bm[/ch]
  She said, "Baby, do you ever miss being alone?"[/tab]
         N.C.
I said, "Hell no, I don't"
[tab][ch]G[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]                                   [ch]Bm[/ch]
  She said, "Do you really think I'm where you belong?"[/tab]
         N.C.
I said, "You know and I know..."


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]
You're perfect for me[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]A[/ch]
Everything I'll ever need[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Bm[/ch]
I ain't playin'[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Bm[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]Bm[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]
What I'm sayin'[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]                      [ch]A[/ch]
When I got what I got I don't miss what I had[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Bm[/ch]
The old me before you belongs to the past [/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]                           [ch]A[/ch]                             [ch]Bm[/ch]
In the back of your mind you might think there's somethin' more I want[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Bm[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]      [ch]Bm[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]
But when I got what I got, girl, I don't[/tab]


[Post-Chorus]
| [ch]G[/ch] | [ch]A[/ch] | [ch]Bm[/ch] | [ch]Bm[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch] | [ch]Bm[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch] |


[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]          [ch]A[/ch]                                     [ch]Bm[/ch]
  I said, "Baby, do you know you sound a little crazy,[/tab]
            N.C.
When you're talkin' like that, girl?"
[tab][ch]G[/ch]          [ch]A[/ch]                                     [ch]Bm[/ch]
  Ain't no second thoughts, no regrets, no kinda maybe[/tab]
   N.C.
No wishin' I turned back


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab]  [ch]G[/ch]
Before you came along[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]A[/ch]
I could go on and on[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Bm[/ch]
Girl, just kiss me[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Bm[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]      [ch]Bm[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]
You're all that I want[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]                      [ch]A[/ch]
When I got what I got I don't miss what I had[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Bm[/ch]
The old me before you belongs to the past[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]                           [ch]A[/ch]                             [ch]Bm[/ch]
In the back of your mind you might think there's somethin' more I want[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Bm[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]      [ch]Bm[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]
But when I got what I got, girl, I don't[/tab]


[Post-Chorus]
| [ch]G[/ch] | [ch]A[/ch] | [ch]Bm[/ch] | [ch]Bm[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch] | [ch]Bm[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch] |
| [ch]G[/ch] | [ch]A[/ch] | [ch]Bm[/ch] | [ch]Bm[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch] | [ch]Bm[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch] |


[Bridge]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]                             [ch]Bm[/ch]
  She said, "Baby, do you ever miss being alone?"[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Bm[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]
I said, "Hell no, I  don't"[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]                      [ch]A[/ch]
When I got what I got I don't miss what I had[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Bm[/ch]                  [ch]Bm[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch]      [ch]Bm[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]
The old me before you belongs to the past[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]                           [ch]A[/ch]                             [ch]Bm[/ch]
In the back of your mind you might think there's somethin' more I want[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Bm[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]      [ch]Bm[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]
But when I got what I got, girl, I don't[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]A[/ch]
No, I don't[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Bm[/ch]
No, I don't[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Bm[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]      [ch]Bm[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]
When I got what I got, girl, I don't[/tab]


[Outro]
| [ch]G[/ch] | [ch]A[/ch] | [ch]Bm[/ch] | [ch]Bm[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch] | [ch]Bm[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch] |
